name: testFilterByStatus
description: Compare number of transactions with selected statuses in the table before and after filter
descriptionHtml: Compare number of transactions with selected statuses in the table before and after filter

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Compare number of transactions with selected statuses in the table before and after filter

steps.name: Set start and end date: 27-06-2025 to 27-06-2025
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Verify: transaction page table has data
Verify: All transactions with selected statuses are shown after filter.
Verify: Only transactions with selected statuses are shown after filter.
